---
subtitle: "Don't Panic — A practical guide to R on Snowflake"
---

## Welcome {.unnumbered}

This guide helps R users run statistical modeling, forecasting, and ML workflows **on Snowflake** — from **RStudio, Posit, VS Code**, or **Workspace Notebooks** — using three open-source packages.

::: {.callout-important}
## Don't Panic

If you are new to Snowflake, start with the [Platform Primer](01_snowflake_platform/index.qmd) and [Glossary](appendices/F_glossary/index.qmd). If you are new to R on Snowflake but know Snowflake already, jump to [Architecture](02_architecture/index.qmd) or [Local R Setup](03_local_r_setup/index.qmd).
:::

## What You'll Learn {.unnumbered}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## Key Topics Covered

- **Snowflake primer** — Warehouses, containers, ML services (for R users new to the platform)
- **R from your IDE** — RStudio, Posit Native App, VS Code + Snowflake extension; pip or conda Python
- **Workspace Notebooks** — UX overview, bootstrap, EAI, `%%R`, CRE, ML Jobs
- **RSnowflake** — SQL REST API, DBI, dbplyr, Arrow
- **snowflakeR** — MLOps, Feature Store, Model Registry, Tasks, SPCS, monitoring
:::

## The Three Packages {.unnumbered}

| Package | Role | Repository |
|---------|------|------------|
| **snowflake-notebook-multilang** | Bootstrap R in Workspace | [Snowflake-Labs/snowflake-notebook-multilang](https://github.com/Snowflake-Labs/snowflake-notebook-multilang) |
| **RSnowflake** | DBI via SQL API | [Snowflake-Labs/RSnowflake](https://github.com/Snowflake-Labs/RSnowflake) |
| **snowflakeR** | ML platform from R | [Snowflake-Labs/snowflakeR](https://github.com/Snowflake-Labs/snowflakeR) |

## How to Use This Guide {.unnumbered}

| Your Goal | Start Here |
|-----------|------------|
| New to Snowflake | [Platform Primer](01_snowflake_platform/index.qmd) |
| RStudio / Posit / VS Code | [Local R Setup](03_local_r_setup/index.qmd) |
| Workspace Notebooks | [Workspaces overview](05_workspaces_overview/index.qmd) |
| Understand SQL API | [RSnowflake SQL API](11_rsnowflake_sql_api/index.qmd) |
| MLOps on Snowflake | [MLOps chapter](15_mlops_on_snowflake/index.qmd) |
| Feature Store deep dive | [Feature Store Implementation Guide](https://snowflake-labs.github.io/snowflake-featurestore-imp-guide/) |
| Term lookup | [Glossary](appendices/F_glossary/index.qmd) |

## Prerequisites {.unnumbered}

- Snowflake account (Workspace optional depending on path)
- R 4.2+; Python 3.10+ for snowflakeR locally
- See [Introduction](00_introduction/index.qmd) for disclaimers

## Revision History {.unnumbered}

| Version | Date | Summary |
|---------|------|---------|
| 0.1 | 2026-05-29 | Initial scaffold |
| 0.2 | 2026-05-29 | IDE chapters; chapter renumber |
| 0.3 | 2026-05-29 | Platform primer, glossary, MLOps/SQL API chapters; feedback pass |
